test_4_tb_concordance.verdict: TB match rate 58% is significantly above null (5%), z=16.2, p≈0.0000 — SUPPORTS DRAVIDIAN HYPOTHESIS

conclusion: The Indus Script Dravidian decipherment achieves 88.3% token coverage [87.5%–89.1%] 95% CI. Grammar slot assignments are statistically significant (p=0.0036). Tamil-Brahmi name concordance rate of 58% significantly exceeds null expectation. Overall: MODERATE STATISTICAL SUPPORT.
